_preset: critical — highest failure cost. Adds gated prod promotion (ENV-04 becomes a BLOCKER), staging data realism (ENV-05 sign-off), rollback DRILLS (RB-02 sign-off), drift detection, and break-glass accounting (HOT-04). BR-03 is also a blocker here. Declaring this tier is a commitment: it activates the full sign-off surface — record real dated judgments with `pipeline jdg new`, never rubber-stamps. Copy to <repo>/pipeline.repo.json and set every field to reality.
recovery_objective: FDRT target: detect a failed deploy within 5 minutes (alerting) and recover within 30 minutes via gated redeploy-previous; reviewed against real incidents/drills quarterly (RB-04).
